---
id: inquiry
title: "Check Status-Inquiry"
description: "Check the status of a payment transaction. For `pending`, `attempted`, `failed`, or `expired` states, Ottu queries the payment gateway for the latest status. For `paid` or `authorized` states, returns the current status immediately."
sidebar_label: "Check Status-Inquiry"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: developers/apis/ottu-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Check Status-Inquiry"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/b/pbl/v2/inquiry/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Check the status of a payment transaction. For `pending`, `attempted`, `failed`, or `expired` states, Ottu queries the payment gateway for the latest status. For `paid` or `authorized` states, returns the current status immediately.

Requires at least one identifier: `session_id` or `order_no`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
